task.title: Render System architecture diagram with component inspector
task.summary: Implement the Control Room System view by rendering architecture.mmd as an interactive diagram and showing component details from matching system Markdown docs.

goal.outcome: Users can navigate system architecture visually and inspect canonical component docs from the Control Room.
acceptance: System view renders the architecture diagram from .codewiki/kb/system/architecture.mmd.
Selecting a component shows frontmatter and useful sections from the corresponding .codewiki/kb/system/<component>.md file.
The view exposes source paths and related docs instead of duplicating truth.
The renderer works locally without requiring internet access.
non_goals: No manual duplicate architecture model separate from architecture.mmd.

summary: TASK-059 System architecture diagram with component inspector

evidence: control-room.test.mjs verifies component doc mapping and parsed summary from api.md.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Added parseArchitectureMermaid, component document parsing, and SVG System diagram rendering in adapters/web/control-room.ts.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: control-room.test.mjs verifies component doc mapping and parsed summary from api.md.
code_change_evidence: Added parseArchitectureMermaid, component document parsing, and SVG System diagram rendering in adapters/web/control-room.ts.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: System view renders the architecture diagram from .codewiki/kb/system/architecture.mmd.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: buildControlRoomSystemModel reads architecture.mmd and browser drawSystemDiagram renders its nodes/edges as SVG.
System SVG node groups have click handlers that call inspectComponent and highlight the selected node.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Selecting a component shows frontmatter and useful sections from the corresponding .codewiki/kb/system/<component>.md file.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: System model maps Mermaid labels ending in .md to system docs, parses frontmatter and ## sections, and inspector renders title, summary, state, source path, and sections.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: The view exposes source paths and related docs instead of duplicating truth.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Inspector renders doc_path and section excerpts from source Markdown; architecture source remains architecture.mmd.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: The renderer works locally without requiring internet access.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Renderer is custom SVG in bundled static JS; no CDN or external request used.
npx tsc --noEmit and npm test passed.

risks: Custom Mermaid subset supports current flowchart syntax; future diagram syntax may require parser expansion.

pr.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-059 Render System architecture diagram with component inspector implementation evidence
pr.body:
TASK-059 System architecture diagram with component inspector

Checks: npx tsc --noEmit, npm test
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.

closure_brief.user_intent: Render system architecture as a selectable diagram with component details from matching system Markdown docs.
implemented_changes: Added architecture.mmd parsing and custom local SVG diagram rendering.
Added component inspector rendering frontmatter, source path, state, and useful Markdown sections.
acceptance_evidence: control-room.test.mjs verifies architecture component mapping and parsed api.md summary.
npx tsc --noEmit and npm test passed.
non_goals_preserved: No manual duplicate architecture model separate from architecture.mmd.
remaining_risks: Future architecture.mmd syntax outside the current flowchart subset may require renderer expansion.
